recommendations.title: Be Sick… It's Free
recommendations.overview: Comedy about the flawed Italian healthcare system of the time and a doctor's expeirence with it.

recommendations.title: Jumping the Broom
recommendations.overview: Two very different families converge on Martha's Vineyard one weekend for a wedding.

recommendations.title: Tau
recommendations.overview: Held captive in a futuristic smart house, a woman hopes to escape by befriending the A.I. program that controls the house.

recommendations.title: Bangla
recommendations.overview: A 22 year-old Bangladeshi-Italian Muslim boy meets a beautiful, exciting Italian girl who makes him re-analyze his beliefs and culture.

recommendations.title: A Whole New Life
recommendations.overview: Gianni is a taxi driver dissatisfied with his life. One day by chance he gets the opportunity to take possession of the villa and life of a billionaire on holiday.

recommendations.title: Yuppies
recommendations.overview: Willy, Giacomo, Lorenzo and Sandro are 4 young yuppies rampant in the "Milano da bere" of the 80s, who live in the myth of Lawyer Gianni Agnelli and Silvio Berlusconi; their only purpose in life is to appear rather than be. Giacomo is an advertiser,

recommendations.title: My Mom Is a Character 3
recommendations.overview: Dona Hermínia will have to rediscover and reinvent herself because her children are forming new families. This supermom will have to deal with a new life scenario: Marcelina is pregnant and Juliano is getting married.

recommendations.title: ¿Y Cómo Es Él?
recommendations.overview: Thomas is a meek man on the verge of a nervous breakdown. Despite his situation he decides to fake a work trip to go to Vallarta to confront Jero, a taxi driver who is sleeping with his wife.

recommendations.title: The Great Day
recommendations.overview: In a large villa on Lake Como, everything is ready to celebrate Elio and Caterina's wedding. It will be the most beautiful day of their lives and also of their parents' lives, especially their respective fathers, Giacomo and Giovanni. Too bad that to

recommendations.title: Three Men and a Leg
recommendations.overview: Friends Aldo, Giovanni, and Giacomo cross Italy from north to south for Giacomo's wedding: the father of the bride, a despotic magnate who is both their boss and father-in-law—since Aldo and Giovanni have also married into the family not for love but
recommendations.director: Massimo Venier, Giacomo Poretti, Aldo Baglio, Giovanni Storti
